case_title: HUAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. GENNADY SILVNYAK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2013 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,688.00 FILED BY HUAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT SILVNYAK, GENNADY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVNYAK, GENNADY $1,688.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,728.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40.50) SERVED JAN-19-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILVNYAK, GENNADY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
